description_long: This bungalow features a spacious single-story layout with a combination of brick and wood exterior walls, topped by multiple intersecting gable and hip roofs in a reddish-brown color. The front yard is landscaped with a curved stone path, outdoor seating, and a small garden, while the backyard includes a gazebo, a round pool, and several flowering trees. Large windows, including a prominent bay window, provide ample natural light and visual interest to the facade. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a double garage with a driveway. Palm trees and ornamental shrubs line one side of the house, adding to the lush, suburban feel. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on outdoor living and open green spaces.
description: A single-story brick and wood bungalow with intersecting gable roofs, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a double garage, surrounded by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, curved garden path, outdoor seating, and double garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a gazebo, round pool, and flowering trees, as well as the palm-lined side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long brick facade, multiple windows, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, gazebo, and additional garden elements, with a clear view of the roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade and grouped side windows
